# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging CI/CD

on: [push]

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
  
    - name: Log environment variables
      run: printenv
      
    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.x'
        
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Run command and log its output
      run: |
        command_output=$(python your_script.py)
        echo "Command output: $command_output"
  
    - name: Deployment
      id: deployment
      run: |
        deploy_output=$(./deploy_script.sh)
        echo "::set-output name=deploy_output::$deploy_output"
    - name: Log deployment details
      run: echo "Deployment details: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.deploy_output }}"
      
    - name: Call API and log response
      uses: actions/github-script@v3
      with:
        script: |
          const axios = require('axios');
          axios.get('https://api.github.com/user')
          .then(response => {
            console.log('API response: ', response.data);
          })
          .catch(error => {
            console.log('API Error: ', error);
          });
          
    - name: Log connection string
      run: echo "Connection string: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}"
